mapper.select: SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(name) AS name, GROUP_CONCAT(numbers) AS numbers FROM base_conditions;

SELECT name, GROUP_CONCAT(total ORDER BY year) AS totalNumbers, GROUP_CONCAT(year ORDER BY year) AS year FROM ( SELECT name, YEAR(time) AS year, SUM(numbers) AS total FROM farm WHERE YEAR(time) BETWEEN YEAR(CURDATE()) - 3 AND YEAR(CURDATE()) GROUP BY name, YEAR(time) ) AS yearly_totals GROUP BY name;

SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(name) AS name, GROUP_CONCAT(total_numbers) AS numbers FROM ( SELECT name, SUM(numbers) AS total_numbers FROM processing_types WHERE YEAR(time) = YEAR(CURDATE()) GROUP BY name ) AS yearly_totals UNION ALL SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(name) AS name, GROUP_CONCAT(numbers) AS numbers FROM base_personnel_distribution;
SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(money ORDER BY YEAR(time))AS money, GROUP_CONCAT(YEAR(time) ORDER BY YEAR(time)) AS time from base_economy_trend where YEAR(time) BETWEEN YEAR(CURDATE()) - 3 AND YEAR(CURDATE());
